title: alias removal + strict batch
manager: The v11 breakage batch: the `property`/`var` aliases (deprecated since v6) are finally removed, and TypeScript strict mode flips on — the last item of its long prerequisite cluster, batched at a major where a breaking change belongs. `lint --future` has warned about the aliases since v6, so nobody is caught off guard; this is exactly the cleanup that a breakage-opens-a-major discipline exists to schedule and contain.
cs: grammar drops property/var aliases (edition-gated); tsconfig strict + the ~200-error burn-down (fsl#712); manifest entries; `lint --future` warned since v6.
